title: SearchResultTrampoline → SubSettings isValidFragment() unconditional true
notes: REJECTED: verifyLaunchSearchResultPageCaller() effectively blocks exploitation. SignatureVerifier checks caller package against allowlist (SettingsIntelligence only). Both fragment path and deep link URI path produce 'Package name: com.android.shell is not allowlisted' and Activity finishes immediately. SubSettings.isValidFragment()=true is still a code smell but unreachable from untrusted caller.
